description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The sofa includes two seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. Three light green, textured throw pillows are arranged on the seat and backrest, adding a subtle accent. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, matching the overall geometric design of the sofa. The legs are short, block-shaped, and finished in a wood tone, slightly recessed beneath the base. The backrest is straight and of medium height, providing ample support while maintaining a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and three light green accent pillows. It features a boxy silhouette and short, block wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat and back cushions, and three light green throw pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, straight armrest, and the profile of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, cushion profile, and pillow arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two uniform seat cushions and two uniform backrest cushions, all attached; three loose, light green throw pillows arranged asymmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, padded armrests at seat height with a boxy, geometric profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-shaped legs in a wood finish, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed under the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
